summary: Journey Replay Feature Testing Complete. Backend: 24/24 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All player components, playback controls, sidebar/quick-action navigation verified working. Minor bug fixed: malformed UUID now returns 422 instead of 500.

minor.issue: Malformed UUID was returning 500 - FIXED by adding try/catch for ValueError

issues: Sessions show 'Unknown' user names - expected per agent context (users table may not have full_name for session owners)

TestReplaySessionsList.test_sessions_admin_access: PASS - Returns sessions with id, user_name, risk_level, alert_count, started_at

TestReplaySessionDetail.test_session_detail_admin_access: PASS - Returns session_id, events array with lat/lng/type/description/timestamp
TestReplaySessionDetail.test_session_detail_malformed_id_returns: PASS - Invalid UUID format returns 422 (after fix)

TestReplayEventTypes.test_events_have_required_fields: PASS - All events have type, lat, lng
TestReplayEventTypes.test_events_have_icon_and_color: PASS - All events have icon and color for UI

TestReplayResponseFields.test_session_detail_has_event_count: PASS - event_count matches events array length

session_list_page.play_icons: PASS - Play icon on each session card

replay_player_page.replay_map: PASS - Map container with dark Carto tiles loads
replay_player_page.replay_timeline: PASS - Timeline panel shows Event Timeline with events
replay_player_page.replay_controls: PASS - Controls bar with all buttons

timeline_features.event_items: PASS - Timeline shows events with data-testid='replay-event-N'
timeline_features.active_highlight: PASS - Current event has cyan border (replay-timeline-active class)
timeline_features.event_clicking: PASS - Clicking timeline event jumps to that event

navigation.back_button: PASS - data-testid='replay-back' navigates to session list
navigation.operator_console_sidebar: PASS - data-testid='op-nav-replay' found in OperatorConsole sidebar
navigation.operator_dashboard_quick_actions: PASS - data-testid='qa-journey-replay' found in OperatorDashboard quick actions

frontend_tests.event_overlay_banner: PASS - Non-movement events show overlay banner (e.g., 'Guardian session started')

critical_code_review_comments: replay.py: Clean implementation combining GuardianSession, GuardianAlert, and Incident models
replay.py: Events properly sorted chronologically before returning
replay.py: RBAC properly enforced via require_role('admin', 'operator')
JourneyReplayPage.jsx: Well-structured with SessionList and ReplayPlayer components
JourneyReplayPage.jsx: All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
JourneyReplayPage.jsx: Speed cycling correctly cycles through [0.5, 1, 2, 4]
JourneyReplayPage.jsx: Timeline auto-scrolls to active event
OperatorDashboard.jsx: Quick Actions correctly includes Journey Replay link
OperatorConsole.jsx: Sidebar correctly includes Journey Replay nav link
seed_data_creation: Used existing 30 guardian sessions in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Journey Replay feature at /replay fully functional. Backend: GET /api/replay/sessions returns list with user_name, risk_level, alert_count; GET /api/replay/{session_id} returns chronological event stream. RBAC enforced - caregiver gets 403. Frontend: Session list shows 30 sessions with risk badges, timestamps, alert counts. Player has map, timeline, playback controls (play/pause, speed cycling 0.5x-4x, prev/next, restart, scrubber). Timeline event clicking works, active event highlighted with cyan. Back navigation works. OperatorConsole sidebar and OperatorDashboard quick actions both have Journey Replay links.
verified_features: GET /api/replay/sessions - returns sessions list with user_name, risk_level, alert_count, started_at, total_distance_m
GET /api/replay/{session_id} - returns event stream with lat/lng, type, description, timestamp, icon, color
RBAC: admin/operator can access, caregiver gets 403, unauthenticated gets 401
Frontend: /replay shows session list with risk badges, timestamps, play icons
Frontend: Clicking session navigates to /replay/{sessionId} player
Frontend: Player shows map (dark Carto tiles) + timeline panel + controls bar
Frontend: Timeline highlights current event with cyan border
Frontend: Clicking timeline event jumps to that event
Frontend: Progress scrubber shows position and can be dragged
Frontend: Back arrow navigates to session list
Frontend: Event overlay banner shows for non-movement events
Frontend: OperatorDashboard Quick Actions has Journey Replay link
Frontend: OperatorConsole sidebar has Journey Replay nav link
